Hint Engine: Enter the engine description or capacity as listed for the vehicle.
Hint Insurance Expiry Date: Choose the insurance expiry date in Gregorian format.
Hint Insurance Number: Enter the insurance number if available.
Hint Insurance Policy Number: Enter the policy number exactly as shown in the insurance document.
Hint Insurance Type: Enter the insurance type number based on your system values.
Hint Operating Card Date: Choose the operating card date or its valid-from date.
Hint Plate Number: Enter the plate number exactly as officially registered.
Hint Registration Validity Date: Choose the vehicle registration validity expiry date.
Hint Serial Number: Enter the internal or manufacturer serial number for the vehicle.
Hint Vehicle Branch: Choose the branch that this vehicle belongs to.
Hint Vehicle Capacity: Enter the capacity or count expected by the current backend field.
Hint Vehicle Category: Choose the vehicle category used for bookings and reports.
Hint Vehicle Color: Enter the main color of the vehicle.
Hint Vehicle Image: Upload a clear JPG or PNG vehicle image.
Hint Vehicle License Expiry Date: Choose the vehicle license expiry date in Gregorian format.
Hint Vehicle Mileage: Enter the current odometer reading in kilometers.
Hint Vehicle Notes: Write any important operational notes about the vehicle.
Hint Vehicle Year: Enter the actual manufacturing year of the vehicle.
Hint VIN: Enter the chassis/VIN number, usually 11 to 17 characters.
